arts.ttl: EFL make official decision for Portsmouth Championship clash vs Coventry City
arts.sum: Portsmouth will welcome Coventry City to Fratton Park on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard makes admission about Coventry City's plans for January transfer business
arts.sum: The head coach revealed he’s had conversations with Sky Blues owner Doug King and head of recruitment Dean Austin and has already started to identify areas on the pitch that might benefit from strengthening, albeit his main focus remains working with the players he has inherited. Frank Lampard has spoken about Coventry City’s plan for the January transfer window and the possibility of adding fresh players to help with the push during the second half of the season.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth v Coventry City: Jordan Cross’ predicted line-up with two significant changes
arts.sum: Pompey embark on a testing festive period tomorrow with Coventry City the visitors to Fratton Park.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard provides mixed injury news on Coventry City pair Haji Wright and Ben Wilson
arts.sum: Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group. As for Wilson, he said: “Ben’s been fully training with us over the last day or two, which is good news because he’s a great character around the place.

arts.ttl: Transfer gossip: Portsmouth eyeing move for Derby County winger with Oxford United also on Blues tormentor’s trail
arts.sum: Pompey are weighing up a January move for Derby County winger Joe Ward, according to reports.

arts.ttl: The latest Portsmouth injury picture - with return dates ahead of Coventry City and Watford
arts.sum: Pompey embark on their busy festive period of fixtures against Coventry City tomorrow.

arts.ttl: The lad from Gosport, Portsmouth supporter and ex-Newcastle favourite on brink of impressive career landmark
arts.sum: It was a career which kicked off with a four-minute cameo for Dagenham & Redbridge and would take in the Premier League, Wembley finals and international recognition.

arts.ttl: DETAILED: The Portsmouth players who will have to go in January window with futures under spotlight
arts.sum: It’s set to be a transfer window which will likely make or break Pompey’s Championship hopes.
